main_story.title: The Awakening of PersiaNexus
main_story.summary: Ancient Persian energies awaken in a future era, bringing legendary heroes and forgotten powers back to Earth.

worlds.name: Ancient Persia
worlds.description: A world of ancient knowledge, warriors, myths and hidden energies.

worlds.name: Future Nexus
worlds.description: A futuristic civilization where AI and ancient wisdom merge.

rules: Ancient energy can awaken forgotten heroes
AI protects balance but does not control destiny
